title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Hexaware Technologies Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Hexaware Technologies Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies Global Group in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies Global Group:
Hexaware Technologies Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies Global Group!
